login.title: Login
login.serverError: Can't connect to server. Try again later!

errors.SERVER_ERROR: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Cannot connect to the server. Please check your internet connection.
errors.MISSING_CREDENTIALS: Please enter both email and password.
errors.MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.MISSING_DROPDOWNS: Please select your preferred language and currency.
errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
errors.INVALID_AMOUNT: The amount must be greater than zero.
errors.BUDGET_ALREADY_EXISTS: A budget already exists for this category and period.
errors.BUDGET_NOT_FOUND_OR_UNAUTHORIZED: Budget not found or you are not authorized to access it.
errors.MISSING_CATEGORY_NAME: Please enter a name for the category.
errors.INVALID_CATEGORY_TYPE: Invalid category type. Must be 'income' or 'expense'.
errors.FORBIDDEN_GLOBAL_CATEGORY_MODIFICATION: You cannot modify default global categories.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_CATEGORY_MODIFICATION: You are not authorized to modify this category.
errors.FORBIDDEN_GLOBAL_CATEGORY_DELETION: You cannot delete default global categories.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_CATEGORY_DELETION: You are not authorized to delete this category.
errors.MISSING_GOAL_FIELDS: Please fill in all goal fields (title, target amount, deadline).
errors.GOAL_NOT_FOUND_OR_UNAUTHORIZED: Goal not found or you do not have permission to access it.
errors.TRANSACTION_NOT_FOUND_OR_UNAUTHORIZED: Transaction not found or you do not have permission to access it.
